metadata.description: One-stop marketplace for Stardust: an AEM Edge Delivery Services pipeline that composes brand, design, and implementation skills. Bundles Stardust plus its peer plugins (superpowers, impeccable, aem-edge-delivery-services) and the eds-site-builder skills it depends on, so users install everything from one place.

plugins.name: stardust
plugins.description: Two-phase pipeline for AEM EDS websites. Design phase (EDS-agnostic): brand, briefings, wireframes (optional), design. EDS phase: eds-design, eds-build, eds-refine. 8 skills: /stardust (navigator), /stardust:brand, /stardust:briefings, /stardust:wireframes, /stardust:design, /stardust:eds-design, /stardust:eds-build, /stardust:eds-refine.

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: Process methodology: brainstorming, subagent-driven development, systematic debugging, TDD, plan writing. Required by Stardust for /brainstorm, /write-plan, /verification, /code-review.

plugins.name: impeccable
plugins.description: Design vocabulary and quality gates: 18 commands (/polish, /distill, /audit, /typeset, /colorize, /shape, /bolder, /quieter, /delight, /craft, /critique, …) plus the impeccable skill. Required by Stardust for design personality capture and refinement loops.

plugins.name: aem-edge-delivery-services
plugins.description: Official Adobe skills for AEM Edge Delivery Services development — block authoring, content modeling, import, testing. Required by Stardust for EDS-native block and page patterns.

plugins.name: eds-brand-design
plugins.description: Brand extraction, design token management, and CSS generation. Provides brand-extractor, brand-css-generator, figma-token-sync, design-system-extractor. Used by /stardust:brand (PDF fallback) and /stardust:eds-design (CSS seeding).

plugins.name: eds-page-generation
plugins.description: AI-powered web page creation and content pipelines. Provides generative-page-pipeline, ai-image-generator, da-content-pipeline, conversational-page-builder. Used by /stardust:eds-build and /stardust:eds-refine publishing.

plugins.name: eds-audit
plugins.description: Website auditing and performance analysis: pagespeed-audit, accessibility-auditor, site-auditor, block-detector. Used by /stardust:eds-refine for Core Web Vitals checks on preview URLs.
